info.name: Lentera Pasar API - MVP Manual QA
info.description: Collection API Lentera Pasar untuk manual QA MVP: auth, internal, website setup, template pack, content CRUD, articles, public API, tracking, leads, dan insights.

request.description: Tidak memakai body agar tidak memicu Fastify empty JSON body error.

item.name: Update Article Detail Setup - Should Stay Hidden

request.description: Expected: backend menolak atau memaksa article_detail tetap hidden dari navbar/footer sesuai implementasi.
Di Postman, pilih file ZIP template pack secara manual jika variable path tidak terbaca.

exec: try { const json = pm.response.json(); if (json.data && json.data.website && json.data.website.trackingKey) pm.environment.set('trackingKey', json.data.website.trackingKey); } catch(e) {}
